title: [codereview-pass1-lock] coap_dtn.c init chunk: added lock around s_dtn_buf/s_senml_pack and provider set but oscore/client_init now under lock (unnecessary but harmless). P3: early lock may deadlock if oscore_init calls back to CoAP. Alternative rejected: separate mutex for senml as combined is simpler per bead. No dead code added. Tagged codereview
